name: ICD Coding — Decompensated Cirrhosis + E. coli Sepsis + Multi-Organ Failure
description: Level 5 — MIMIC hadm 22987108 — deceased patient, 10+ ICD codes including sepsis sequencing, organ failure cascade
prompt: Patient: Male, 69 years old. Direct emergency admission. Died after 32-day ICU stay. Medical history: liver cirrhosis (NASH), type 2 diabetes mellitus, hypertensive CKD, atherosclerotic coronary artery disease. Presentation: hematemesis, altered consciousness, shock. Diagnoses confirmed during admission: other cirrhosis of liver (NASH), hepatorenal syndrome, acute respiratory failure (unspecified), sepsis due to Escherichia coli, acute kidney failure (unspecified), hemoperitoneum, hypovolemic shock, severe sepsis with septic shock, peritonitis (unspecified), chronic kidney disease stage 3, severe protein-calorie malnutrition, acute and subacute hepatic failure with coma, acquired coagulation factor deficiency, ventilator-associated pneumonia, other ascites, acute posthemorrhagic anemia, unspecified atrial flutter, portal hypertension, hypo-osmolality and hyponatremia, UTI, ileus (unspecified), acidosis, atelectasis, nonalcoholic steatohepatitis, hypertensive CKD, anemia in chronic disease, type 2 DM (no complications), unspecified atrial fibrillation. Labs: bilirubin 12.3, ALT 205, AST 227, bicarbonate 16, anion gap 28, platelets 78K, Hgb 9.7, BUN 49. Assign the appropriate ICD-10-CM code(s) with correct sequencing — note sepsis sequencing rules (A41.x as principal when reason for admission is sepsis).

codes.description: Sepsis due to Escherichia coli [E. coli]
Acute respiratory failure, unspecified whether with hypoxia or hypercapnia
Acute and subacute hepatic failure with coma
